mapper.sql: id, password, nickname, avatar, gender, email, signature, status, last_login_time, remark, create_time, update_time

u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.gender, u.email, u.signature, u.status, u.remark, u.last_login_time, u.create_time, u.update_time, ( select count(1) from user_action ua where ua.user_id = u.id and ua.action_type = 'like_song' ) as like_song_count, ( select count(1) from user_action ua where ua.user_id = u.id and ua.action_type = 'favorite_playlist' ) as favorite_playlist_count, ( select count(1) from user_action ua where ua.user_id = u.id and ua.action_type = 'play_song' ) as play_history_count
mapper.update: update `user` set nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, email = #{email}, signature = #{signature} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from `user` u where u.id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update `user` set nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, email = #{email}, signature = #{signature}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from `user` where last_login_time is not null and last_login_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day)
